headline: Why Gartner (IT) Is Up 6.3% After Raising Guidance And Expanding Its Buyback Program - And What's Next
summary: In the past week, Gartner, Inc. reported Q1 2026 results showing revenue of US$1.51 billion, net income of US$222.34 million, earnings per share ahead of the prior year, and updated its full-year outlook alongside a higher share repurchase authorization. The company’s decision to complete a long-running buyback program and add another US$600 million to its authorization highlights management’s confidence in Gartner’s cash generation and long-term business model, even as it faces securities...
